LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROP 65 SETTLEMENT AND PROPOSED CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. COUNSEL APPEARED IN COURT AND ANSWERED SOME INQUIRIES FROM THE COURT. THE COURT FINDS THE REFORMULATION AND WARNING PROVISIONS REASONABLE AND COMPLIANT WITH THE LAW. THE FEES AND PENALTY PROVISIONS ARE ALSO REASONABLE. ORDER AND JUGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY, REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR # 5220
